code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut p = 1
  for tok in parts
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      p = p * n
    when None
      p = p
    end
  end
  println("product=#{p}")
when None
  println("product=1")
end
